name: joshua-phillips-portfolio
description: Portfolio website for Joshua Darron Phillips

scripts.minify:css: npx clean-css-cli -o dist/assets/css/main.min.css assets/css/main.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/assets/css/animations.min.css assets/css/animations.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/assets/css/experience.min.css assets/css/experience.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/assets/css/blog.min.css assets/css/blog.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/assets/css/case-study.min.css assets/css/case-study.css
scripts.minify:js: npx terser assets/js/nav.js -o dist/assets/js/nav.min.js && npx terser assets/js/reveal.js -o dist/assets/js/reveal.min.js && npx terser assets/js/hero.js -o dist/assets/js/hero.min.js && npx terser assets/js/cards.js -o dist/assets/js/cards.min.js && npx terser assets/js/spotlight.js -o dist/assets/js/spotlight.min.js && npx terser assets/js/theme.js -o dist/assets/js/theme.min.js && npx terser assets/js/back-to-top.js -o dist/assets/js/back-to-top.min.js && npx terser assets/js/blog.js -o dist/assets/js/blog.min.js && npx terser assets/js/timeline.js -o dist/assets/js/timeline.min.js && npx terser assets/js/analytics.js -o dist/assets/js/analytics.min.js && npx terser assets/js/experience.js -o dist/assets/js/experience.min.js && npx terser assets/js/case-study.js -o dist/assets/js/case-study.min.js
scripts.images:webp: echo 'Convert images with: cwebp -q 80 input.png -o output.webp (requires cwebp CLI)'
scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
